Name: EASTMAN EAWSI 250 Arc Welding 250A Inverter Welder IGBT Technology Lightweight 4kg Fan Cooled Kit Accessories
Description: ADVANCED IGBT TECHNOLOGY: Integrates premium Insulated-Gate Bipolar Transistor (IGBT) circuitry to deliver a smoother, more stable welding arc and superior power efficiency compared to traditional welders. HIGH-POWER CAPACITY: Provides a robust and easily adjustable welding current range of 20-250A, allowing you to tackle thicker metals with ease while operating safely on a 160-250V input voltage. OPTIMIZED COOLING SYSTEM: Equipped with a continuous fan-cooled mechanism that rapidly dissipates internal heat, ensuring better performance and preventing thermal overload during extended sessions. ULTRA-PORTABLE DESIGN: Weighing only 4.00 kg with a built-in carrying handle, this compact machine is designed for ultimate mobility, letting you easily transport it to any job site or workshop.
